title: VendingGear
description: A parody comedic mod that adds a tank vending machine.
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/zj1fqRT.png)
This mod was commissioned by Tacoredneck, to create a parody of the 7up tank commercial. After drinking a random number of potions a Vending Gear Tank will spawn above the player and throw random potions at them.
